subject: Kami (Dragon Ball Super) — green-skinned Namekian elder in white and blue robes with a prominent circular red kanji symbol on the chest, standing in a calm dignified pose
description: An elderly green-skinned Namekian figure in white and blue robes stands in a composed, dignified posture. A large circular red kanji symbol is clearly visible on the chest of the robes. The figure's expression is calm and authoritative, befitting a guardian elder. The background shows warm gold-orange tones suggesting an interior or spiritual space. The composition is a mid-shot slightly below eye level.
foreground: elderly green-skinned robed Namekian with red kanji circle on chest, calm authoritative stance
